description: Revamp TriviaGameScreen.kt UI to match the web frontend style - add background image, cyan/teal theme, sound effects for correct/wrong/streak/finish, countdown bar, and enhanced styling. DO NOT change any ViewModel calls or game logic.
steps: Step 1: Read the current TriviaGameScreen.kt to confirm existing ViewModel calls.

Step 2: Revamp TriviaGameScreen.kt UI: (a) Add GameBackground with URL 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/images/asset/games/background/trivia-background.jpg'. (b) Make Scaffold/TopAppBar transparent. (c) Change accent color from MysticGold to TriviaCyan (#37c7d4) for this screen's title, borders, progress bar, and buttons. Keep correct answer green (#22c55e) and wrong answer red (#ef4444) as they already are. (d) Style question card and answer options to match web: semi-transparent dark bg, cyan borders. (e) Add a countdown timer bar (10 seconds) that animates width from 100% to 0% during each question - purely visual timer decoration, does NOT affect game logic (the game logic already handles timing server-side). Use a gradient purple-blue like the web (LinearGradient from blue to purple). (f) Add sound effects using SoundManager: on correct answer with streak < 5 play 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/success.mp3', on correct with streak >= 5 play 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/great-success.mp3', on wrong answer play 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/wrong.mp3', on game finish (result screen shown) play 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/finish.mp3'. Trigger sounds based on uiState.lastAnswerCorrect and uiState.streak values after the answer response. (g) Start BGM on entry: 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/bgm/bgm-iq.mp3', stop on exit.
Step 3: Ensure ALL ViewModel interactions remain unchanged: viewModel.startGame(category, count), viewModel.answerQuestion(id, answer), viewModel.finishGame().
Step 4: Verify the result screen still shows score, streak, duration correctly.
acceptance_criteria: TriviaGameScreen.kt displays background image from remote URL
Cyan/teal theme color (#37c7d4) used for accents
Sound effects play: success.mp3 on correct, great-success.mp3 on streak>=5, wrong.mp3 on incorrect, finish.mp3 on result
BGM plays on entry, stops on exit
A decorative countdown bar with gradient is visible during questions
All ViewModel function calls remain identical
Result screen still shows score, streak, duration
verification: Read TriviaGameScreen.kt and verify ViewModel calls unchanged
Verify SoundManager usage for all 4 SFX types and BGM
Verify GameBackground usage with correct URL
